events.title: Neon Nights Concert
events.description: A live music event featuring electronic, pop, and synth-driven performances with immersive lighting and visuals.

events.title: Soul & Strings Session
events.description: An evening of soulful vocals and live string arrangements blending contemporary songs with rich acoustic textures.

events.title: Riverfront Jazz Evening
events.description: A relaxed outdoor music event where jazz ensembles perform classic standards and modern improvisational pieces by the water.

events.title: Indie Pulse Live
events.description: A showcase of independent bands and singer-songwriters performing original tracks in an intimate venue.

events.title: Bassline Bazaar
events.description: A high-energy music gathering centered on DJs, dance beats, and a festival atmosphere with food and art vendors.

events.title: Laugh Track Live

events.description: A playful comedy event where performers roast everyday topics, pop culture, and audience-submitted prompts.

events.title: Improv After Dark

events.title: Midnight at the Museum
